call.transcript:
Agent: Hello! Welcome to Cook in Fiesta. I'm Carly, how can I help you today?
Customer: Hi, I'm interested in the Feijoada Experience. How much does it cost and what's included?
Agent: Great choice! The Feijoada Experience is a hands-on cooking class where you learn to prepare a traditional Brazilian feijoada from scratch. The experience is priced at R$250 per person and includes all ingredients, a recipe booklet to take home, and of course you get to enjoy the meal you prepare. The session lasts approximately 3 hours.
Customer: That sounds great. Do you have availability this Saturday?
Agent: I don't have real-time availability information right now, but you can check current availability and book directly on our booking page. Would you like me to share the link?
Customer: Yes please.
Agent: Here you go: cookinfiesta.com/book. You'll be able to see all available dates and times there. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Customer: No, that's all. Thank you!
Agent: You're welcome! Enjoy the Feijoada Experience. Bom apetite!
